name: X-Golf
about: X-Golf Denville is an indoor golf simulator venue offering a sports bar and entertainment experience. The facility features state-of-the-art simulators using a combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors for accurate tracking. Pricing is based on simulator time per bay, accommodating up to six people, and the venue provides amenities like a full bar, food service, and club rentals. It is designed for golfers of all skill levels and is suitable for casual play, practice, leagues, and private events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology with high accuracy
Full bar and food service available on-site

food_and_drink.notes: Shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas available
Full bar with beer, cocktails, and wine by the glass or on tap

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental golf clubs are available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed, as the venue offers a full bar and food service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes approximately one hour for one person to play 18 holes. Additional players may require more time.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome.
